content: هُوَّ هَيِسقُط في الامتحان لاَ مَحَالَةً عَلَشان هُوَّ مِش مُستَعِدّ
translations: eng:he will definitely fail the test because he is not ready

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa hayis'ut fiil'imtihaen la mahaela Aalashaen huwwa mish mustaAidd
